project_type: Next.js 15 frontend + Python FastAPI backend, monorepo
build_system: pnpm for frontend, pip for backend, Docker Compose for orchestration
test_framework: Jest with @testing-library/react for frontend, pytest for backend
verification_instructions: Run pnpm lint and pnpm test in the frontend directory. Both should pass without errors.
environment_constraints: No backend server available for integration testing. Frontend lint and unit tests are the primary verification. node_modules already installed.
contribution_requirements: No formal CONTRIBUTING.md. Follow existing code patterns and conventions.
key_patterns: Pages are in app/ directory (Next.js App Router). API helpers in lib/api.ts and lib/api-extended.ts. Session management via next-auth/react useSession(). Access token accessed as (session as any)?.accessToken. Components in components/ directory. Settings page uses Card, Toggle UI components. Tasks page uses @dnd-kit for drag and drop with closestCorners collision detection.
directory_structure: frontend/app/ - pages and API routes, frontend/components/ - shared UI, frontend/lib/ - utility and API helpers, frontend/hooks/ - custom hooks, backend/app/api/ - FastAPI routers, backend/app/agents/ - AI agent modules
